meta.title: BORACAY
meta.subtitle: Aklan, Western Visayas
meta.description: Every visit to the picturesque Boracay is a tropical vacation that will undoubtedly be memorable. Fall in love again and again with the island's white sand, crystal blue waters, and festive atmosphere that keeps Boracay close to every traveler's heart.

attractions.name: White Beach
attractions.description: The most famous beach in Boracay, known for its powder-white sand, crystal-clear waters, and vibrant atmosphere.

attractions.name: Puka Shell Beach
attractions.description: A quieter, more secluded beach at the northern tip of Boracay, named after the puka shells found along its shores.

attractions.name: Willy's Rock
attractions.description: An iconic volcanic rock formation rising from the sea at Station 1, topped with a shrine of the Virgin Mary.

attractions.name: Crocodile Island
attractions.description: A small island off the coast of Boracay shaped like a crocodile, surrounded by rich coral reefs.

attractions.name: Diniwid Beach
attractions.description: A small, peaceful cove just north of White Beach, accessible via a rocky trail — perfect for a quiet escape.

attractions.name: Mount Luho View Deck
attractions.description: The highest point in Boracay offering a 360-degree panoramic view of the entire island and surrounding seas.

attractions.name: Bat Cave
attractions.description: A natural cave on the island housing thousands of fruit bats. A fascinating and unique attraction near Puka Beach.
attractions.things_to_do: Cave exploration, bat watching, nature walk

attractions.name: Bulabog Beach
attractions.description: Located on the eastern side of Boracay, this beach is the hub for kitesurfing and windsurfing enthusiasts.

attractions.name: Magic Island
attractions.description: A small islet famous for its cliff diving spots, offering jumps of various heights for thrill-seekers.

activities.name: Island Hopping
activities.description: Explore the beautiful islands surrounding Boracay by boat, visiting crystal-clear lagoons and snorkeling spots.

activities.name: Parasailing
activities.description: Soar above Boracay's breathtaking coastline while being towed by a speedboat for an unforgettable aerial view.

activities.name: Kitesurfing
activities.description: Bulabog Beach is one of Asia's top kitesurfing destinations. Lessons and equipment rentals available for all levels.

activities.name: Scuba Diving
activities.description: Discover vibrant coral reefs and diverse marine life in the waters around Boracay with certified dive operators.
activities.things_to_do: Diving, marine life viewing, coral exploration

activities.name: Snorkeling
activities.description: Explore the underwater world just below the surface at Crocodile Island and other spots teeming with marine life.

activities.name: Sunset Sailing
activities.description: Sail along the coast on a traditional paraw sailboat and witness Boracay's legendary golden sunsets.

activities.name: ATV Riding
activities.description: Ride all-terrain vehicles through the forest trails and rugged terrain of the island's interior.

activities.name: Cliff Diving
activities.description: Test your courage with jumps from platforms of varying heights at the famous Magic Island cliff diving spot.

activities.name: Helmet Diving
activities.description: Walk on the ocean floor with a special helmet that keeps your head dry — no swimming skills required!
activities.things_to_do: Underwater walking, fish feeding, marine viewing

food.name: Seafood BBQ
food.description: Fresh catch of the day grilled to perfection along the beachfront — a must-try Boracay dining experience.

food.name: Halo-halo
food.description: The iconic Filipino shaved ice dessert loaded with mixed fruits, sweet beans, leche flan, and ube ice cream.

food.name: Mango Float
food.description: A beloved Filipino no-bake cake made with layers of graham crackers, cream, and fresh Boracay mangoes.

food.name: Pusit (Grilled Squid)
food.description: Freshly caught squid stuffed with tomatoes and onions, grilled and served with a tangy dipping sauce.

food.name: Kare-kare
food.description: A rich Filipino oxtail stew cooked in peanut sauce, served with fermented shrimp paste and banana blossom.

food.name: Fresh Buko Juice
food.description: Cold fresh coconut juice served straight from the shell — the perfect tropical refreshment on a hot beach day.

food.name: Lechon de Leche
food.description: Whole roasted suckling pig with perfectly crispy skin — a centerpiece dish at Filipino celebrations.

food.name: Sinigang
food.description: A sour Filipino soup made with tamarind broth, vegetables, and your choice of pork, shrimp, or fish.

food.name: Sisig
food.description: A sizzling Filipino dish made from chopped pork face and ears, seasoned with calamansi and chili — best paired with cold beer.

events.name: Ati-Atihan Festival
events.description: One of the Philippines' oldest and grandest festivals celebrating the Ati people with colorful costumes, dancing, and music.

events.name: Boracay Funboard Cup
events.description: An international windsurfing competition held annually at Bulabog Beach, attracting top athletes from around the world.

events.name: ArTboracay
events.description: An annual arts and culture festival showcasing local and international artists through exhibits, live performances, and workshops.

events.name: New Year's Countdown
events.description: Boracay's legendary New Year's Eve celebration with spectacular fireworks, live music, and beach parties along White Beach.
events.things_to_do: Fireworks, parties, live music, beach gathering

events.name: Easter Mass on the Beach
events.description: A unique and moving sunrise Easter Mass held directly on the sands of White Beach, drawing thousands of locals and tourists.

events.name: Paraw Regatta
events.description: The oldest traditional sailboat race in Asia, featuring colorful paraw boats racing along Boracay's coast every February.

events.name: Boracay Food Festival
events.description: A celebration of Filipino and international cuisine featuring top restaurants, cooking competitions, and food stalls.
events.things_to_do: Food tasting, cooking shows, cultural performances

events.name: Sandcastle Competition
events.description: Teams of artists and locals compete to build the most creative and elaborate sandcastles along White Beach.

events.name: Sinulog sa Boracay
events.description: Boracay's vibrant version of the famous Sinulog Festival, featuring street dancing, colorful costumes, and cultural performances.

accommodations.name: Shangri-La Boracay
accommodations.description: A world-class luxury resort nestled on Boracay's northern hillside with private beaches, infinity pools, and panoramic ocean views.

accommodations.name: Discovery Shores
accommodations.description: An award-winning beachfront resort on Station 1 offering elegant rooms, a stunning infinity pool, and direct beach access.
accommodations.things_to_do: Beach, pool, dining, spa, water activities

accommodations.name: Henann Resort
accommodations.description: One of Boracay's most popular resorts featuring multiple swimming pools, lush gardens, and direct access to White Beach.

accommodations.name: The Lind Boracay
accommodations.description: A sophisticated boutique hotel on White Beach offering stylish rooms, a rooftop bar, and personalized service.

accommodations.name: Fairways & Bluewater
accommodations.description: A sprawling golf and beach resort offering villas, condotel units, a golf course, and stunning ocean views.

accommodations.name: Movenpick Resort
accommodations.description: A premium international resort brand offering Swiss-inspired hospitality, beachfront access, and world-class amenities.
accommodations.things_to_do: Beach, pool, fine dining, spa, wellness

accommodations.name: Crimson Hotel
accommodations.description: A vibrant beachfront hotel on White Beach known for its colorful design, lively atmosphere, and excellent value.

accommodations.name: Be Grand Resort
accommodations.description: A modern resort on Bulabog Beach offering sleek rooms, rooftop pools, and panoramic views of the Sibuyan Sea.

accommodations.name: Astoria Boracay
accommodations.description: A stylish hotel steps from White Beach offering comfortable rooms, a pool, and easy access to Boracay's top attractions.
